'''Denava''' was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] with six [[Moon/Legends|moons]]. It was the third [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Goroth system/Legends|Goroth system]]. It measured 153,050 [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] in diameter and had strong [[Magnet/Legends|magnetic]] and radio fields. The upper [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] was home to a [[Beldon/Legends|beldon]]-like [[Species/Legends|species]] of gas-filled creatures.

{{Planet-stub}}
